scope_note: Conceptual framework only. State-specific statutory requirements are intentionally not hardcoded.

package_ids.definition: Unique inventory/package tags used to identify cannabis lots and finished goods.

transfers.definition: Movement of cannabis goods between licensed entities with manifest-level traceability.

batch_tracking.definition: Grouping production events for test results, QA release, and recall capability.

high_level_rules.principle: Every inventory movement and transformation should be reconstructable from source to sale.
Operational stages (receive, process, package, transfer, sell) must have attributable records.
Any reconciliation gap or data mismatch should trigger a documented corrective workflow.
Inventory or document variance above policy threshold requires manager escalation and CAPA linkage.

state_overlay_model.conceptual_layer: Use universal controls first: traceability, records integrity, and accountability.
state_overlay_model.state_specific_layer: Apply state statutes, rule citations, and local enforcement guidance as overrides.
state_overlay_model.guidance: When uncertain, present conservative operational controls and refer user to official state authority links.
